prompt: Using the provided reference image of the curry in the pan, transform it into a polished Japanese gourmet magazine advertisement page for キーマカレー. Keep the curry recognizable as the same dish, but restyle it as a premium food photograph served in a rustic ceramic bowl on a wooden tabletop, with richer gloss, deeper color contrast, and more appetizing texture. Create a full editorial layout with 3 main content areas: 1) a large hero section at the top featuring the plated curry on the right and Japanese promotional copy on the left, including a small top banner label and a large headline; 2) a bottom-left chef profile area with 1 portrait of a chef in dark workwear and apron, arms crossed in a restaurant kitchen, plus vertical Japanese copy and a handwritten-style name caption; 3) a bottom-right information area containing 1 quote block and 1 framed “secret of deliciousness” panel with exactly 3 numbered steps, each paired with a food or cooking image. Add warm ambient lighting, shallow depth of field, spices and garlic props around the hero dish, and an upscale traditional restaurant branding feel. Include Japanese text throughout, with the main headline emphasizing slow-cooked, exquisite curry, and use elegant Mincho-style typography in brown, cream, and gold tones. The final composition should look like a high-end restaurant feature article or promotional brochure page.
